title: So just connected Claude api to my bots on mt5 on a 1k aquafunded account.
author: EnvironmentalBid9987
selftext: I used zero coding skill just good old vibes coding and ai assists. We have to go through a few iterations but we finally got there, learnt a lot like don’t try make trading bot that does everything just force on one strategy per bot. Unfortunately we are at a long weekend so no trading till Tuesday where will see how the bot will do this week in a live market I will keep you all updated.

comments.author: Expensive-Fun-1014
comments.body: Sup dude im working on a similar projects is there anyway we can start chatting and discussing ideas ?

replies.author: EnvironmentalBid9987
replies.body: Sure man if you want chat send me a dm would love to talk about this in great detail

replies.author: EnvironmentalBid9987
replies.body: All you need to do is ask Claude how to set this all up step by step guide

comments.author: Solidsneakers_
comments.body: Interesting. How can I do this or could you help?

replies.author: EnvironmentalBid9987
replies.body: All you need my friend is Claude premium as for it build your but ask for it to continue your telegram etc Claude premium really important because you will reach you date limit very fast.

comments.author: Ho_Lee_Fuk_20
comments.body: Interested to see the results. Following.

comments.author: Didierhm
comments.body: I built a  telegram MarsteMiind\_AIBot and its send full analysys in real time for entries. Have greats results. DM if you want a suscription, you will learn how to do good entries and get results with SL contolled and risk management

replies.author: EnvironmentalBid9987
replies.body: No thanks dude I’m trying help people build their own bots

comments.author: Emergency-Cicada1158
comments.body: Justamente estoy en lo mismo, pero no hay una guía definitivamente de que métricas usar y como usar para que el bot analice el mercado y opere. Si le pasó mucho se marea o se vuelve muy estricto al punto que las ganancias son de 2 años o nunca. Si reduzco se vuelve más impredecible

replies.author: EnvironmentalBid9987
replies.body: Bro you know , I think I found balance with this bot but we have wait for the forward testing to finish
